basic_details.short_information: Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) Consultant in the EP&W Division Notification 2026 has been released on 10 July 2026 on the official website mea.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MEA Consultant in the EP&W Division Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 28 years Maximum Age: 63 years

qualification.education_qualification: Masters degree/Graduate degree on migration related issues, good writing, analytical and speaking skills in English and any other foreign language, proficient in computer. Masters degree in Emigration related issues and 5 Years experience in Government OR retired officers of Government of India (US/DS/Director Level, preferably MEA) OR 1-2 years of working in the Government preferably in MEA and have preferably worked on Migration related issues.
qualification.details: Masters degree/Graduate degree from a reputed Indian or International institution/University on migration related issues as a part of the syllabus. Good writing, analytical and speaking skills in English and any other foreign language. Proficient in computer. Work experience: Masters degree in Emigration related issues and 5 Years experience in Government OR retired officers of Government of India (US/DS/Director Level, preferably MEA) OR 1-2 years of working in the Government preferably in MEA and have preferably worked on Migration related issues.

salary_details.pay_scale: Maximum of Rs. 10 lakh per annum
salary_details.details: Maximum of Rs. 10 lakh per annum

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MEA Consultant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the MEA Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download MEA Consultant in the EP&W Division Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MEA Consultant in the EP&W Division Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Masters degree/Graduate degree from a reputed Indian or International institution/University on migration related issues as a part of the syllabus. Good writing, analytical and speaking skills in English and any other foreign language. Proficient in computer. Work experience: Masters degree in Emigration related issues and 5 Years experience in Government OR retired officers of Government of India (US/DS/Director Level, preferably MEA) OR 1-2 years of working in the Government preferably in MEA and have preferably worked on Migration related issues.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 28 years Maximum Age: 63 years

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Maximum of Rs. 10 lakh per annum

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MEA Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the MEA Consultant in the EP&W Division recruitment is 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Masters degree/Graduate degree on migration related issues, along with good writing, analytical, and speaking skills in English and any other foreign language. Proficiency in computer is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Consultant position is between 28 years and 63 years as on the last date of application submission.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of a maximum of Rs. 10 lakh per annum.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Consultant in the EP&W Division post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is Q/PF/575/70/2023.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview or written test.

faq.question: Q10. Does the Ministry of External Affairs offer any age relaxation?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information.
